Describe the sequence of visual scenes presented in the video, noting specific objects and actions as they appear over time.
canonical_answer: At 0s, salt and pepper shakers appear with title text; at 4s, spilled salt is shown on a black surface next to a tipped shaker; at 8s, a hand pours red powder from a green spoon onto chopped vegetables in a pot; at 16s, a finished pasta dish with cheese and spinach is displayed in a black pan.

question: Walk through the key visual elements shown in each segment, specifying the items and their states at different timestamps.
canonical_answer: At 2s, two glass spice grinders with wooden tops sit on a wooden surface; at 6s, a glass shaker with a perforated black lid lies horizontally amidst white granules; at 10s, a light-colored pot contains pale vegetable chunks receiving red powder; at 17s, cooked penne pasta is topped with crumbled white cheese and green leaves.
